body:
Caltech's central cluster has been having some library issues, and one of the affected libraries is MPITrampoline. As a result, this has been split out from the `climacommon` module and it has to be loaded explicitly.

This PR marks the MPI job to soft fail as it won't be able to reliably find MPITrampoline until the library issue is fixed.

See https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaModules/issues/48 for more information

I also increased the memory requested for some GPU jobs, since they were hitting the memory limit and seg faulting in this branch and others - e.g. [here too](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaocean-ci/builds/5853#019d02d4-d192-4e78-a6cb-21e35e2c68f0)
title: explicitly load MPIWrapper for MPI jobs on central
